id.description: Unique identifier for the movie, UUID v4 format.

title.description: Complete title of the movie or documentary.

author.description: Full name of the director or creator(s).

publication_year.description: The year the movie was published or released.

duration.description: Duration of the movie in minutes.

language.description: Original audio language of the content, using ISO 639-1 language codes (e.g., en, es, fr).

platform.description: URL to the main viewing platform (YouTube, Prime Video, etc.).

description.description: Multiline description of the movie content.

contributor_names.description: List of contributors identified by their GitHub usernames.

tags.description: List of associated tags for the movie. Tags must be from the predefined list of 51 items.

license.description: License for the content. CC-BY-SA-V4 is the default with share-alike clause. MIT allows almost unrestricted use.

files.description: Movie thumbnail image. Should be a movie poster or representative frame.
